steps.name: Perform login request with the userCredentials
Seting up the BaseURI, Content Type as Application/JSON and attaching the SensitivedData Filter
Getting the Property Value from the config file
Expecting the response to have Content Type as Application/JSON, Status 200 and Response Time Less than 1000ms

labels.name: story
labels.value: Valid User Should be able to login into the System
